prompt: A steampunk workshop scene with this pocket watch as the centerpiece.
prompt_refined: Generate a detailed steampunk workshop scene featuring the ornate gold pocket watch from image 1 as the prominent centerpiece. The pocket watch, open and displaying its white face with black hands and Roman numerals, is positioned centrally in the foreground on a worn wooden workbench. The background depicts a cluttered workshop with an array of intricate brass gears, steam pipes, clockwork mechanisms, and various tools, all rendered with a warm, ambient light characteristic of a Victorian-era inventor's space.
